case_title: ROBERT BURCHELL ET AL VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ET AL

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BURCHELL, ROBERT AN INDIVIDUAL F/V ROSE MARIE, INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION ANFINSON, ERIK AN INDIVIDUAL BARNETT, JOHN AN INDIVIDUAL BATES, SARAH AN INDIVIDUAL F/V AL-W A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION BURNS, KEN AN INDIVIDUAL CAMERON, CHRIS AN INDIVIDUAL MJ FISHERIES, INC.
